title: Communauté d'agglomération de Nevers
summary: Communauté d'agglomération de Nevers is the communauté d'agglomération, an intercommunal structure, centred on the town of Nevers. It is located in the Nièvre department, in the Bourgogne-Franche-Comté region, central France. Created in 2003, its seat is in Nevers. The commune Saint-Éloi joined the communauté d'agglomération in January 2024. Its area is 266.4 km2. Its population was 67,223 in 2021, of which 32,830 in Nevers proper.
text:
Communauté d'agglomération de Nevers is the communauté d'agglomération, an intercommunal structure, centred on the town of Nevers. It is located in the Nièvre department, in the Bourgogne-Franche-Comté region, central France. Created in 2003, its seat is in Nevers. The commune Saint-Éloi joined the communauté d'agglomération in January 2024. Its area is 266.4 km2. Its population was 67,223 in 2021, of which 32,830 in Nevers proper.

Composition
The communauté d'agglomération consists of the following 14 communes:
